BENSERIDI Hamid
BENSERIDI Hamid
Grade:Professeur
Grade:Professeur
Email:hamid.benseridi@univ-setif.dz

Département:Mathématiques
Bureau:
Bureau:

Mr. Hamid  Benseridi
is currently a Professor in the Department
of Mathematics, Faculty of Science, University of Sétif 1 since December 12,
1998.
He obtained  his doctorate in Applied
Mathematics  in July 3, 2005, from
the Department of Mathematics, University of Sétif 1. In June 2008, he obtained
the title of Academic Habilitation from the same institution, and got promoted
to the rank of MCA the same date.
Area of
research interest
: Functional
Analysis (Partial Differential Equations),
Applied
Mathematics (modeling in continuous porous media) and Asymptotic analysis.
